text_template: The Old Gays are back with Silver Linings, their lovable podcast from Ruby Studio in partnership with Veve Healthcare. Robert, Mick, Bill, and Jesse strut back down memory lane for season two, sharing lessons on life, love, and loss. These are the kind of insights that only come from experience. So tune in to Silver Linings with the Old Gaze on the app or wherever you get your podcasts.
